context.updateVariable('jv_transient_has_count_check', transient_has_count_check)
print(jv_transient_has_count_check)

/* Note: this query will be run as a subquery for the purposes of sampling the data.
   As such it will be restricted by any subquery limitations specified by the current platform. */
   
SELECT
	CASE 
    	WHEN COUNT(*) >= 1 THEN TRUE
        ELSE FALSE
    END AS HAS_COUNT
FROM (
    SELECT 1 AS CNT 
    FROM ${ev_database_20_integration}.${ev_data_foundation_schema_20_integration}.TRANSIENT_$$target_table$$_DELTA
)

5826309.text: Validate if the TRANSIENT table created has data.

1.value:
-- Makes sure each BK only have 1 active flag = true
WITH VERSIONS_CNT AS (
    SELECT 
        JOURNEY_NODE_CONNECTION_ID_BK, ANNEX_SITE_ID_BK,
        COUNT(*) AS total_records,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ACTIVE_FLAG = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ACTIVE_FLAG_CNT
    FROM ${ev_database_30_presentation}.$$target_schema$$."$$target_table$$"
    GROUP BY JOURNEY_NODE_CONNECTION_ID_BK, ANNEX_SITE_ID_BK
)
SELECT '$$target_table$$: distinct BK cnt comparison' AS TEST_TYPE, s.CNT AS SOURCE, t.CNT AS TARGET
FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT
    FROM VERSIONS_CNT
) as s
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT
    FROM VERSIONS_CNT
    WHERE ACTIVE_FLAG_CNT = 1
) as t

UNION ALL

-- Makes sure there is no record taht has VALID_FROM >= VALID_TO
SELECT '$$target_table$$: VALID_FROM >= VALID_TO' AS TEST_TYPE, s.CNT AS SOURCE, t.CNT AS TARGET
FROM (
	SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT
    FROM ${ev_database_30_presentation}.$$target_schema$$."$$target_table$$"
) as s
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT
    FROM ${ev_database_30_presentation}.$$target_schema$$."$$target_table$$"
    WHERE VALID_FROM < VALID_TO
) as t

UNION ALL

-- Makes sure that the count distinct of the BK composite key in Staging == Presentation
SELECT '$$target_table$$: distinct BK cnt comparison' AS TEST_TYPE, s.CNT AS SOURCE, t.CNT AS TARGET
FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ID, SITE_ID) AS CNT
    FROM ${ev_database_10_staging}."$source_schema$"."$source_table$"
) s
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT JOURNEY_NODE_CONNECTION_ID_BK, ANNEX_SITE_ID_BK) AS CNT
    FROM ${ev_database_30_presentation}.$$target_schema$$."$$target_table$$"
) t
